name: Waterloo 4pk Mesh & Aluminum Table Chaise Lounges - Gray - Christopher Knight Home
description:
Lay back and enjoy the summer sun in a chaise lounge set that brings excellent style to any outdoor décor. Featuring a built-in side table made with eucalyptus wood, these lounges offer convenient space to set your items such as a refreshing drink or a bowl of snacks. Not only do these chaise lounges bring unparalleled style to your outdoor space but it also offers breathable outdoor mesh that provides ultimate comfort for you and your guests, allowing you to enjoy summer to the fullest.

EUCALYPTUS WOOD: These chaise lounges use eucalyptus wood which is made to last for years due to its highly durable properties. Offering beautiful natural textures and patterns, this moisture-resistant wood is as attractive as it is long-lasting.

ALUMINUM FRAME: This lounge set is built with aluminum, creating a lightweight and stable frame. This material is rust-resistant which will further extend the life of your product.

MESH SEATING: This features seating constructed of outdoor mesh material, making our chaise lounges both flexible and supportive. This lightweight material allows air to circulate and ventilates body heat on a hot day.

ADJUSTABLE: Our chaise lounge set offers adjustable seating to ensure maximum comfort. This accommodates five different positions, including a fully reclined option.

ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Some assembly is required for this chaise lounge set. All of the instructions and tools needed for assembly are included. This comes as a set of four.
